steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: The question asks which equation has the same solution, i.e., which equation is equivalent to $5x = 15$.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• '$5x=154$': Gives $x = 30.8$, not 3. ✗
  • '$5x=29$': Gives $x = 5.8$, not 3. ✗
  • '$5x=15$': Gives $x = 3$, same solution as the original equation. ✓
  • '$5x=3$': Gives $x = 0.6$, not 3. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
